research.audience_analysis: Stressed computer science students worried about their future.
viral_angles: The real job is just prompting now
hooks: Are you a CS major? Your degree might be useless.
interesting_facts: AI still can't center a div.

script.hook: So you're a CS major? Bad news, AI just stole your job.

sections.label: Hook
sections.content: So you're a CS major? Bad news, AI just stole your job.

sections.label: Problem
sections.content: Just kidding. But seriously, everyone is panicking about Devin and GPT-4 writing code. You're probably wondering if you should drop out and become a plumber.

sections.label: Solution
sections.content: Here's the truth: AI is great at writing boilerplates, but it still hallucinates APIs that don't exist. Your new job isn't writing syntax, it's debugging AI hallucinations. You're basically an AI babysitter now.

sections.label: CTA
sections.content: Hit subscribe if you're ready to embrace your new life as a professional prompt engineer.

script.full_script: So you're a CS major? Bad news, AI just stole your job. Just kidding. But seriously, everyone is panicking about Devin and GPT-4 writing code. You're probably wondering if you should drop out and become a plumber. Here's the truth: AI is great at writing boilerplates, but it still hallucinates APIs that don't exist. Your new job isn't writing syntax, it's debugging AI hallucinations. You're basically an AI babysitter now. Hit subscribe if you're ready to embrace your new life as a professional prompt engineer.

scenes.visual_description: Creator looks stressed holding a laptop
scenes.image_prompt: Stressed college student looking at glowing laptop screen, dark room, cinematic lighting

thumbnail.layout: Creator face on right (shocked), robot typing on left
thumbnail.image_prompt: Futuristic robot sitting at a desk aggressively typing on a mechanical keyboard, neon red backlighting, high contrast

seo.title: Will AI Replace Programmers? (The Truth)
seo.description: Are you a CS major worried about AI taking your job? Here is what you need to know about Devin, GPT-4, and the future of software engineering.
